overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The car navigates through intersections, under overpasses, and past iconic landmarks like the MedCenter and various hotels, stopping at traffic lights along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with commercial neon signage

events.description: vehicle approaches and stops at red traffic light behind a black sports car

agents.ego_description: cruising through downtown Night City following a black sports car, then braking to stop at the red light

notable_agents.action: black sports car ahead that slows down and stops at the red traffic light

entered.detail: illuminated red sign reading 'Forbes' mounted on building facade
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the multi-lane road
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person vehicle camera following a black sports car through a neon-lit downtown street. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful building lights as the vehicle approaches an intersection, slowing to a stop at a red traffic light beneath an overhead signal gantry.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle begins to accelerate

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light waiting for the signal to change, observing pedestrians on the sidewalks

entered.detail: tall commercial building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle remains stationary at the red light at a downtown intersection. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and crosswalks while the camera waits. After several seconds, the traffic signal changes to green, signaling the vehicle to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway passing MedCenter

events.description: vehicle accelerates through the intersection and turns right to enter the underpass
enters covered underpass area beneath elevated highway structure
passes the Night City MedCenter building with its distinctive red signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light, turning right, and driving beneath the overpass past the MedCenter

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street near the MedCenter entrance

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the roadway
large medical facility with 'Night City MedCenter' red signage and multiple levels
thick support columns holding up the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the intersection and turns right to enter a covered roadway beneath an elevated highway. The lighting shifts to artificial overhead lights as the car passes concrete support pillars and drives alongside the Night City MedCenter building, where pedestrians are visible near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with hotel and pawnshop

events.description: exits the covered underpass back into the open neon-lit street
turns left at the intersection passing the hotel building

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and navigating through the commercial district, turning left at the hotel intersection

entered.detail: multi-story building with large purple 'HOTEL' signage and illuminated windows
blue illuminated sign reading 'PAWNSHOP' on the lower level of the hotel building
tall vertical neon sign depicting red lips mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underpass into a commercial area dominated by a large hotel building with prominent purple signage and a ground-floor pawnshop. The car turns left at the intersection, passing pedestrians on the sidewalks and colorful neon advertisements including a distinctive vertical red lips sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown avenue with towering skyscrapers

events.description: vehicle approaches and stops at red traffic light behind another car

agents.ego_description: cruising down the wide avenue surrounded by towering skyscrapers, then braking to stop at the red light

notable_agents.action: sedan ahead that stops at the red traffic light

entered.detail: towering futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky
pedestrian or vehicle bridge connecting buildings high above the street
large glowing advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle driving down a wide downtown avenue flanked by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. An overhead bridge spans the road ahead. The car approaches an intersection and comes to a stop at a red traffic light behind another vehicle, concluding the drive through Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a black sports car as it navigates a neon-drenched downtown district, transitioning from open city streets into covered underpasses and back into a towering commercial corridor. It begins on a wet asphalt road reflecting colorful lights, slowing to a halt at a red traffic light beneath an overhead signal gantry. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection and turns right, shifting from the open night air into the artificial glow of a covered roadway beneath an elevated highway and past the Night City MedCenter. The scene then opens back up into a commercial area as the car emerges from the underpass, turning left past a hotel with purple signage and a distinctive red lips advertisement. Finally, the camera follows the car down a wide avenue flanked by massive digital billboards and skyscrapers before coming to a stop at another red light beneath an overhead bridge.
